---
title: Curriculum Vitæ
freeze: false
date-format: long
date: 05/12/2026
published-title: CV last updated
---

<p class="text-center">
  <a class="btn btn-primary btn-lg cv-download" href="../assets/pdf/Srikrishnan-CV.pdf" target="_blank">
    <i class="fa-solid fa-file-arrow-down"></i>&ensp;Download current CV
  </a>
</p>

::: {.cv-page}

{{< cv-header >}}

# Research Interests

{{< cv-section interests >}}

# Appointments

{{< cv-section appointments >}}

# Education

{{< cv-section education >}}

# Publications

## Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles

{{< cv-bibliography papers >}}

## Articles Under Review or Forthcoming

{{< cv-bibliography inpress >}}

## Reports

{{< cv-bibliography reports >}}

## Books

{{< cv-bibliography books >}}

## Conference Proceedings

{{< cv-bibliography conferences >}}

## Conference Presentations

{{< cv-bibliography talks >}}

## Conference Posters

{{< cv-bibliography posters >}}

# Invited Talks

{{< cv-section talks >}}

# Grants and Contracts

{{< cv-section grants >}}

# Networks and Projects

{{< cv-section projects >}}

# Teaching

{{< cv-section teaching >}}

# Advising

{{< cv-section advising >}}

# Committee Member

{{< cv-section committee >}}

# Awards

{{< cv-section awards >}}

# Outreach

{{< cv-section outreach >}}

# Service

{{< cv-section service >}}

# Professional Experience

{{< cv-section experience >}}

:::
